{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LSCBenefitsVerifyAssessment.SetValue5", "elementValueMap" : { "PersonalPhoneNumberNew" : "=IF(%IsMobileNumberChanged%,%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_Mobile%,'')", "PersonalEmailIdNew" : "=IF(%IsEmailIdChanged%,%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_Email%,'')", "PersonalFaxNumberNew" : "=IF(%IsFaxNumberChanged%,%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_Fax%,'')", "PersonalShippingAddressNew" : "=IF(

IF(%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_ShippingStreet%, %LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_ShippingStreet%, '') + 
IF(%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_ShippingCity%, ' ' + %LSC_BV_v2_Data_Patient_ShippingCity%, '') +

IF(%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingCity%, ' ' + %LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingCity%, '') + 
IF(%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingState%, ' ' + %LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingState%, '') + 
IF(%LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingPostalCode%, ' ' + %LSC_BV_v2_Data_Pharmacy_ShippingPostalCode%, '') +
